name: 05-06-system-public-welfare-llm-config
title: System/Public Welfare LLM Config Boundary
description: Keep system/public-welfare taverns open with no-key rules fallback while allowing owners to opt into kilo-auto/free or other configured models.
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented system/public-welfare LLM boundary: unconfigured owner-selected free model choices keep these shops open and runtime falls back to local rules; ordinary taverns still close when LLM config is incomplete. Added kilo-auto/free owner opt-in preset and Trellis/spec notes. Verified compileall, focused pytest, frontend test, and frontend build.
